title: Baker Hughes data show a third-straight weekly rise in active U.S. oil-drilling rigs
text: Baker Hughes BKR, +0.14% on Friday reported that the number of active U.S. rigs drilling for oil rose by two to 604 this week. That followed increases in each of the past two weeks.

title: 4 Low Price-Book Ratio Stocks
text: Screening for stocks with market caps over $10 billion and price-book ratios near or below 1.5 could provide a good starting point for value investors as they seek to find opportunities among the myriad of U.S.-listed stocks. Thus, value investors may want to consider the following stocks, as they meet the above criteria and are recommended by Wall Street.

title: Permian Oil Drilling Rig Count Rises for Two Straight Weeks
text: In its weekly release, Baker Hughes Company (BKR) reports that the oil rig count is higher in the Permian Basin.

title: Baker Hughes data show a second straight weekly climb in active U.S. oil-drilling rigs
text: Baker Hughes BKR, -5.96% on Friday reported that the number of active U.S. rigs drilling for oil rose by three to 602 this week. That followed an increase of eight the week before.

title: 7 Oil Stocks to Buy on the Dip or You'll Be Kicking Yourself Later
text: Featuring one of the market's love-hate affairs, the relevant-though-controversial category of oil stocks to buy will likely become increasingly intriguing to investors. Facing what could be a brutal winter for much of the world, geopolitical tensions cynically facilitate upside catalysts for hydrocarbon-related companies.

title: Baker Hughes data show a weekly climb in active U.S. oil-drilling rigs
text: Baker Hughes BKR, -3.04% on Friday reported that the number of active U.S. rigs drilling for oil rose by eight to 599 this week. That followed declines in each of the previous two weeks.

title: Baker Hughes Announces Date for Third Quarter 2022 Earnings Release and Webcast
text: HOUSTON and LONDON, Sept. 16, 2022 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Baker Hughes (NASDAQ: BKR) will hold a webcast Wednesday, Oct. 19, 2022, to discuss the results for the third quarter ending Sept. 30, 2022. The webcast is scheduled to begin at 8:30 a.m. Eastern Time (7:30 a.m. Central Time). A press release announcing the results will be issued at 7 a.m. Eastern Time (6 a.m. Central Time).

title: Helium One inks Baker Hughes partnership as it prepares to drill Tanzania well
text: Helium One Global Ltd (AIM:HE1, OTCQB:HLOGF) has announced a milestone partnership ahead of phase II drilling at its Rukwa project in Tanzania. It has signed a letter of intent with the international oil and gas consultants Baker Hughes, which will provide integrated services ahead of the ‘spudding' of an evaluation well in January or February next year.

title: Permian Oil Drilling Rig Count Falls for Two Straight Weeks
text: In its weekly release, Baker Hughes Company (BKR) reports that the oil rig count is lower in the Permian Basin.

title: Baker Hughes: An Oil Service Leader With Tailwinds
text: Baker Hughes Co. ( BKR , Financial) provides technologies and services to energy and industrial companies on a global basis. It has historically operated through four segments: Oilfield Services, Oilfield Equipment, Turbomachinery & Process Solutions and Digital Solutions.

title: Baker Hughes data show a second straight weekly decline in active U.S. oil-drilling rigs
text: Baker Hughes BKR, +5.02% on Friday reported that the number of active U.S. rigs drilling for oil fell by five to 591 this week. That followed a decline of nine oil rigs the week before.

title: Baker Hughes to restructure organization into two units
text: Oilfield services firm Baker Hughes Co said on Tuesday it will simplify its organizational structure by reducing its business units to two from four, starting Oct. 1.

title: Baker Hughes to restructure organization, to cut number of reporting segments in half
text: Baker Hughes Co. BKR, +2.76% announced Tuesday a restructuring aimed at simplifying the organization and improving profitability. The oilfield products and services company said it expects to cut costs by at least $150 million, as it restructures its four product companies to focus on two reporting businesses, and streamlines its corporate structure.

title: Permian Oil Drilling Rig Count Falls in 4 of 5 Weeks
text: In its weekly release, Baker Hughes Company (BKR) reports that the oil rig count is lower in the Permian Basin.

title: This Shortage Could Send Oil Stocks (and Dividends) Soaring
text: Oil companies don't have what they need to pump more oil.

title: Baker Hughes data show a weekly drop in the number of active U.S. oil-drilling rigs
text: Baker Hughes BKR, +3.56% on Friday reported that the number of active U.S. rigs drilling for oil fell by 9 to 596 this week. That followed an increase of 4 oil rigs the week before.

title: Energy stocks are in a 'sweet spot' with no resolution to the energy crisis on the horizon, JPMorgan says
text: The S&P 500 Energy sector is a standout because of attractive valuations and strong fundamentals. The sector is the top gainer on the S&P 500 index.
